<tbox>
- 34 sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature(spiky_blue_center) and hasVisualFeature(spiky_bracts)
- 81 sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature(large_petals) and hasVisualFeature(prominent_center_stamens)

- 71 sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature(pink_or_magenta_petals) and hasVisualFeature(speckled_center)
</tbox>
<abox>
- hasVisualFeature(Target, large_petals)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, prominent_center_stamens)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, purple_petals)
</abox>
<dl_explanation>
- The Target Image features a flower with large, broad petals and a very prominent, central cluster of stamens.
- These visual characteristics match the patterns observed in the examples for class 81 (large petals and prominent center).
- Therefore, the Target Image is classified as 81.
</dl_explanation>

<response>81</response>
